barbarian.label: Barbarian
barbarian.description: A fierce warrior of primal rage

bard.label: Bard
bard.description: An inspiring performer of music, dance, and magic

cleric.label: Cleric
cleric.description: A miraculous priest of divine power

druid.label: Druid
druid.description: A nature priest of primal power

fighter.label: Fighter
fighter.description: A master of all arms and armor

monk.label: Monk
monk.description: A martial artist of supernatural focus

paladin.label: Paladin
paladin.description: A devout warrior of sacred oaths

ranger.label: Ranger
ranger.description: A wandering warrior imbued with primal magic

rogue.label: Rogue
rogue.description: A dexterous expert in stealth and subterfuge

sorcerer.label: Sorcerer
sorcerer.description: A dazzling mage filled with innate magic

warlock.label: Warlock
warlock.description: An occultist empowered by otherworldly pacts

wizard.label: Wizard
wizard.description: A scholarly magic-user of arcane power
